data.name: FurstDate: A Furry Dating Simulator 🐾
data.detailed_description:
You’re feeling bored, so you download a dating app called "FurstDate." And that’s how your romantic adventures begin...

FurstDate is the app where everyone can find their match! MILFs, Goths, Tomboys—you want them? They’re all yours, as long as you have enough passion!

  • Ann, 26: The busiest of them all—she doesn’t waste time on anything useless.

  • Amanda, 36: The most experienced. She knows exactly how to take care of you.

  • Emma, 18: The shy one. She hasn’t had a single date in real life, but she’s dated hundreds in "Otome" games.

  • Zoey, 21: The sexy goth chick! Don’t even try to approach her unless you can name three "Fur Division" songs.

  • Hailey, 19: She likes to dominate guys, but who knows? Maybe you’ll be her exception.

FurstDate is a short furry dating simulator featuring five datable characters, each with their own unique personality. Find the girl of your dreams, ask for a date, and have some fun!

Features:

  • 5 datable characters!

  • HD, fully original artwork

  • Approximately 2 hours of content

  • A relaxing atmosphere

最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: anything from this millenium
